function[T0: Monoid](x0: Unit[T0], x1: Unit[T0]) { Mul.mul[Unit[T0]](x0, x1) = unit_mul[T0](x0, x1) }[M](v, w)

goal: Mul.mul(u, Mul.mul(v, w)) = unit_mul[M](u, unit_mul[M](v, w))

p.c: function[T0: Monoid](x0: Unit[T0], x1: Unit[T0]) { Mul.mul[Unit[T0]](x0, x1) = unit_mul[T0](x0, x1) }[M](u, unit_mul[M](v, w))

goal: Mul.mul(Mul.mul(u, v), w) = unit_mul[M](unit_mul[M](u, v), w)

p.c: function[T0: Monoid](x0: Unit[T0], x1: Unit[T0]) { Mul.mul[Unit[T0]](x0, x1) = unit_mul[T0](x0, x1) }[M](unit_mul[M](u, v), w)

goal: unit_mul[M](u, unit_mul[M](v, w)) = unit_mul[M](unit_mul[M](u, v), w)
Mul.mul(u, Mul.mul(v, w)) = Mul.mul(Mul.mul(u, v), w)
exists(k0: Unit[M], k1: Unit[M], k2: Unit[M]) { Mul.mul(k0, Mul.mul(k1, k2)) != Mul.mul(Mul.mul(k0, k1), k2) }

p.c: not forall(x0: Unit[M], x1: Unit[M], x2: Unit[M]) { Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x0, Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x1, x2)) = Mul.mul[Unit[M]](Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x0, x1), x2) }
exists(k0: Unit[M], k1: Unit[M], k2: Unit[M]) { Mul.mul[Unit[M]](k0, Mul.mul[Unit[M]](k1, k2)) != Mul.mul[Unit[M]](Mul.mul[Unit[M]](k0, k1), k2) }
(forall(x0: Unit[M], x1: Unit[M], x2: Unit[M]) { Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x0, Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x1, x2)) = Mul.mul[Unit[M]](Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x0, x1), x2) } = true or false = true)
(forall(x0: Unit[M], x1: Unit[M], x2: Unit[M]) { Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x0, Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x1, x2)) = Mul.mul[Unit[M]](Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x0, x1), x2) } = true)

goal: forall(x0: Unit[M], x1: Unit[M], x2: Unit[M]) { Mul.mul(x0, Mul.mul(x1, x2)) = Mul.mul(Mul.mul(x0, x1), x2) }

p.c: not forall(x0: Unit[M], x1: Unit[M], x2: Unit[M]) { Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x0, Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x1, x2)) = Mul.mul[Unit[M]](Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x0, x1), x2) }
exists(k0: Unit[M], k1: Unit[M], k2: Unit[M]) { Mul.mul[Unit[M]](k0, Mul.mul[Unit[M]](k1, k2)) != Mul.mul[Unit[M]](Mul.mul[Unit[M]](k0, k1), k2) }
let w0: Unit[M] satisfy { exists(k0: Unit[M], k1: Unit[M]) { Mul.mul[Unit[M]](w0, Mul.mul[Unit[M]](k0, k1)) != Mul.mul[Unit[M]](Mul.mul[Unit[M]](w0, k0), k1) } }
let w1: Unit[M] satisfy { exists(k2: Unit[M]) { Mul.mul[Unit[M]](w0, Mul.mul[Unit[M]](w1, k2)) != Mul.mul[Unit[M]](Mul.mul[Unit[M]](w0, w1), k2) } }
let w2: Unit[M] satisfy { Mul.mul[Unit[M]](w0, Mul.mul[Unit[M]](w1, w2)) != Mul.mul[Unit[M]](Mul.mul[Unit[M]](w0, w1), w2) }
let w3: Unit[M] satisfy { exists(k3: Unit[M]) { Mul.mul[Unit[M]](w0, Mul.mul[Unit[M]](w3, k3)) != Mul.mul[Unit[M]](Mul.mul[Unit[M]](w0, w3), k3) } }
let w4: Unit[M] satisfy { Mul.mul[Unit[M]](w0, Mul.mul[Unit[M]](w3, w4)) != Mul.mul[Unit[M]](Mul.mul[Unit[M]](w0, w3), w4) }
let w5: Unit[M] satisfy { Mul.mul[Unit[M]](w0, Mul.mul[Unit[M]](w3, w5)) != Mul.mul[Unit[M]](Mul.mul[Unit[M]](w0, w3), w5) }

goal: forall(x0: Unit[M]) { Mul.mul(x0, function(x1: Unit[M]) { unit_inverse[M](x0) }(x0)) = One.1[Unit[M]] }
